title: Roasted Mediterranean Paella
description: A flavorful and indulgent take on the classic Spanish dish, combining the richness of roasted vegetables with the brightness of Mediterranean herbs.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced zucchini and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the roasted red peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the paella rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked.
Stir in the sliced almonds and Mediterranean seasoning.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Let the paella rest for 5-10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
